◎简　　介  

　　A love triangle between Lor and the two daughters of Por Pit named Phuean and Phaeng. Phuean is the selfish older sister and Phaeng is the tomboy younger sister. Lor is Por Pit's distanced nephew. He was taken in by Por Pit after his parents died. Phuean, Phaeng, and Lor were raised up together. Lor took care of Phaeng since they're little because Phaeng was very attached to hi...
